state.description: Debtor has not paid the invoice after a reminder was sent.
state.legal_issue: Debtor has not paid the invoice after a reminder was sent.

node_00b24b3c.title: Payment reminder issued to debtor

state.description: Plaintiff sent a payment reminder document to the debtor due to non-payment of invoice after initial reminder.
state.legal_issue: Whether debtor will pay following payment reminder or legal action is necessary.

legal_references.extract: A debtor is in default if payment is not made after a reminder.
legal_references.summary: Legal basis for the plaintiff to send payment reminders.

artifacts.content: Payment reminder sent to debtor for unpaid invoice.

references.reference: Civil Code §286(2) - Deadline to avoid default
references.extract: Debtor must pay within a reasonable time after reminder to avoid default liabilities.
references.summary: Deadline for debtor payment after reminder is typically set to 7 days.

deadlines.summary: Debtor must pay the invoice within 7 days after receiving the payment reminder.

node_00b24b3c.summary: Plaintiff Tim issued a formal payment reminder to debtor Andi for the unpaid invoice after initial reminder.

artifacts.content: Payment reminder sent to debtor for unpaid invoice.

conditions: Debtor has not yet paid the invoice
Reminder was not sufficient to prompt payment

legal_references.extract: A debtor is in default if payment is not made after a reminder.
legal_references.summary: Legal basis to issue payment reminders upon overdue payment.
